af_score_components.notes: Agent Domain Service MCP. Has MCP (quality 70). Domain/DNS management for agents. Documentation moderate. Service authentication required. Rate limits from service. Infrastructure ops focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Strong auth for domain operations (critical privilege). Fine-grained permissions (DNS, registration, renewal). Domain control highly sensitive. Credential management critical.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Domain service reliability typically high (ISPs, registrars have strong SLAs). Async operations (propagation times). Suitable for infrastructure automation.

af_score_components.notes: agent-fin — financial/fintech agent tool. No MCP documented. Documentation minimal. Purpose for financial operations or data. Regulatory implications if used in regulated context.

security_score_components.security_notes: Financial tools require strong security. HTTPS likely. Auth and credential management critical. No documentation on compliance/auditing. Early stage — likely not hardened for financial operations.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Financial operations require high reliability. No SLA documented. Early stage. Not suitable for production financial operations without significant hardening.

af_score_components.notes: Agent Fusion MCP. Has MCP (quality 70). Multi-agent coordination framework. Documentation moderate. Auth for agent coordination. Rate limits for message passing. Agent orchestration focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Agent coordination requires careful auth and isolation. Message passing security critical. Privilege escalation risk if agents can tamper with messages. Documentation insufficient for full assessment.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Multi-agent systems add complexity. Failure modes involve cascading agent failures. No SLA. Suitable for orchestrating multiple agents with resilience planning.

af_score_components.notes: agent-interviews — agent for conducting interviews. No MCP documented. Documentation sparse. Purpose for HR/research interviews. Likely uses speech/NLP.

security_score_components.security_notes: Interview recordings contain PII/sensitive information. HTTPS likely. Auth for interview platforms. Data privacy critical (GDPR, CCPA). No documentation on data retention/handling.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Interview systems require consistent availability. No SLA documented. Audio quality and transcription reliability critical. Early stage.

af_score_components.notes: Agent Marketplace MCP. Has MCP (quality 70). Agent discovery/trading platform. Documentation moderate. Auth for marketplace operations. Rate limits for transactions. Commerce focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Marketplace requires strong transaction security. HTTPS enforced. Auth and identity verification critical. Payment processing (if applicable) adds regulatory requirements. Fraud prevention essential.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Marketplace availability critical for commerce. Transaction processing needs high reliability. Async settlement patterns. Suitable for agent trading with transaction guarantees.

af_score_components.notes: Agent MCP (generic/meta). Has MCP (quality 75). MCP framework or abstraction for agent tools. Documentation adequate. Auth depends on underlying MCPs. Rate limits inherited. Meta-layer for MCP.

security_score_components.security_notes: MCP abstraction layer adds security responsibilities. Credential forwarding requires careful handling. HTTPS likely. Auth pass-through model — security depends on underlying MCPs.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Meta-layer reliability depends on underlying MCPs. Abstraction can improve or worsen reliability. No SLA. Suitable for unifying MCP access patterns.

af_score_components.notes: Agent MCP Gateway. Has MCP (quality 80). Gateway for routing to multiple MCPs. Documentation good. Auth for gateway + underlying MCPs. Rate limits aggregated. Orchestration focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Gateway is security boundary. HTTPS required. Auth/authz for request routing critical. Credential management for downstream MCPs. Token pass-through or refresh? Audit logging essential.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Gateway reliability critical (single point of failure). Request retry logic. Downstream MCP failures must be handled. Suitable for scaling agent access to multiple MCPs.

af_score_components.notes: Agent Media MCP. Has MCP (quality 70). Media asset management for agents. Documentation moderate. Auth for media platforms. Rate limits for asset operations. Content management focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Auth for media access (copyright/licensing). Fine-grained permissions (read, write, delete). Asset data sensitive (creator info, metadata). Audit logging for compliance.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Media platform reliability (CDN, storage). Large file handling adds complexity. Async transcoding/processing. Suitable for content-heavy agent workflows.

af_score_components.notes: Agent Memory MCP. Has MCP (quality 75). Memory/storage for agents. Documentation adequate. No auth required (local). Rate limits for storage ops. State management focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local memory storage. Data encryption at rest (depends on implementation). No built-in auth (filesystem permissions). Agent context isolation needed. Memory could contain secrets if not careful.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Storage reliability (depends on backend — local disk, database). ACID guarantees if database-backed. Suitable for agent state persistence.

af_score_components.notes: agent-never-give-up — retry/persistence framework for agents. No MCP documented. Documentation sparse. Purpose for resilient agent execution. Likely handles retries and fallbacks.

security_score_components.security_notes: Retry logic could leak timing information. No documentation on secret handling in retries. Early stage — security posture unclear.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Retry framework for improving agent reliability. No SLA. Backoff strategy important (exponential, jitter). Suitable for resilient agent automation.
